overview: Command A Reasoning (08-2025) is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Command A Reasoning line. Released 2025-08-21. Cohere's reasoning-tuned model with a token-budgeted thinking phase for agents.
What's notable in this version: Cohere's first reasoning model; controllable token-budgeted thinking, 256K context, 23 languages, built for enterprise agents, tool use, and multi-step reasoning.
